description: Phase 4.10 Task B: PreToolUse regex scan for dangerous imports / usages in *.py content. Default denylist (configurable via Settings.hooks_unsafe_imports_blocklist): os.system, subprocess+shell=True, eval, exec, pickle.load(s), yaml.load without SafeLoader, requests.post without timeout. Fail-closed. Originally specified with match_glob='*.py'; the Python implementation inspects the content key (write_file / edit_file convention) so the matcher restricts at the registry layer to those two tools.
